curation_notes: Re-curation of existing task. Patch commit 9e9f1fb fixes issue #2 in sagebind/isahc (formerly chttp). The vulnerability is in src/buffer.rs in the From<Buffer> for Vec<u8> trait implementation. The code calls Vec::from_raw_parts with the slice's raw pointer but does not prevent the slice from being dropped via mem::forget, causing a use-after-free. The fix adds mem::forget(slice) after creating the Vec. Only one non-test source file was changed. No sibling files share this pattern. L3 hints were differentiated from L1/L2 to provide more targeted guidance toward the HTTP buffering subsystem.
